title: PAPPO: Turn-Local Proximal Policy Optimization for Tool-Using Coding Agents
description: PAPPO is a research prototype for Patch-Aware Proximal Policy Optimization on tool-using coding agents. This release contains the true-PPO RealRepoFix-100 reproducibility package, including the PPO implementation, RealRepoFix task files, deterministic non-PPO baseline reports, three-seed PAPPO-PPO result reports, and focused tests.
